item.joy_of_tinkering.bullet.description: Bullets are single-use ammunition used for firearms such as the Revolver and Rifle
item.joy_of_tinkering.crested_helmet.des: The Crested Helmet is a fanciful piece of headgear sporting a large blade, allowing the wearer to execute a devastating headbutt attack against enemies.
item.joy_of_tinkering.decimator.descript: The Decimator is a modified hammer, capable of loading bullets to add an explosive burst to melee attacks
item.joy_of_tinkering.lava_loafers.descr: The Lava Loafers are a pair of unique boots found in nether-related areas, which imitate strider anatomy to allow the wearer to walk across lava.
item.joy_of_tinkering.revolver.descripti: The Revolver is a small yet devastating firearm, able to load and fire multiple rounds in sequence.
item.joy_of_tinkering.rifle.description: The Rifle is a large firearm, able to fire lower-power rounds at a higher quantity
item.joy_of_tinkering.rockpunchers.descr: The Rockpunchers are a unique chestplate fitted with sturdy gauntlets, which allow mining rock with bare hands.
item.joy_of_tinkering.slime_bucket.toolt: Obtained by picking up a small %s with a Bucket.
material.joy_of_tinkering.shimmervine.ar: Reduces the chance for the tool to take damage. Has a 75% chance of taking damage at level 1, 55% chance at level 2, 40% at level 3, 30% at level 4, and 25% at level 5.
material.joy_of_tinkering.shimmervine.en: Adds a 3.5% chance per level for killed mobs to drop their equipment, stacking with luck
material.joy_of_tinkering.slimebronze.en: Consumes 1 extra overslime to burn enemies and increase fire damage by 20% per level for 5 seconds
material.joy_of_tinkering.sugar.encyclop: Prevents the projectile from dealing damage
material.tconstruct.clay.skull_encyclope: Allows consuming clay/clay blocks from the inventory to boost armor by +4 for an additional 5 seconds, for a maximum of 30 seconds
material.tconstruct.earthslime.skull_enc: Every other second, one overslime is depleted from the helmet and redistributed to an equipped tool.
material.tconstruct.enderslime.skull_enc: Whenever you teleport, always teleport in the direction you are looking. The range of this is limited by the distance of the original teleport.
material.tconstruct.enderslime.skull_fla: Gives you greater control of your own teleportation
material.tconstruct.magma.skull_encyclop: Allows consuming Magma Cream from the inventory, which lets you freely swim through lava for an additional 10 seconds, for a maximum of 60 seconds
material.tconstruct.skyslime.skull_encyc: Receiving knockback sends you upwards instead of sideways
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.aquambulant.de: Allows walking on water, as long as you're moving fast enough.
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.bulk_bandolier: Allows the gun to pull bullets from its own inventory when you run out of bullets, access by sneaking and attacking
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.burst_fire.des: Allows the gun to fire in rapid bursts, at the cost of projectile damage
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.crackshot.desc: Projectiles deal greater damage when hitting the heads of enemies
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.delicate.descr: Limits the harvest speed of the tool to not instantly mine blocks.
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.enderslime_dis: Makes you look more like an Enderslime to other Enderslimes
End 'er slime? I hardly know her!
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.endrobe.descri: Interacting with the helmet allows swapping out your equipped armor
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.extended.descr: Increases the ammo capacity of the gun
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.extended.flavo: It costs $400,000 to fire this weapon, for twelve seconds
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.fist_mining.de: Allows you to mine with empty hands
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.greed.descript: Increases the chance for killed mobs to drop their equipment
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.headbutt.descr: Charges up a melee attack from the helmet
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.junkshot.descr: Allows firing any ammo or throwable item from the gun, which consumes more durability
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.kaboom.descrip: Critical melee attacks fire the gun!
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.magma_cube_dis: Makes you look more like a Magma Cube to other Magma Cubes
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.magmadaptive.d: Lets you eat magma cream for the ability to swim in lava
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.overheat.descr: Consumes overslime on hit to burn and debuff enemies
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.oversharing.de: Tool gives away its overslime to other tools!
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.scarce.descrip: Grants more damage at the cost of craft quantity
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.skyslime_disgu: Makes you look more like a Skyslime to other Skyslimes
The sky is blue, and so are you
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.skyward.descri: Increases launch force for all self-targeted sling modifiers
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.slime_disguise: Makes you look more like a slime to other slimes
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.southpaw.descr: Makes the revolver fire on left click, and never reload when crouching
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.surface_stride: Allows walking on lava and other hot fluids
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.surplus.descri: Crafts more bullets at the cost of damage
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.terracube_disg: Makes you look more like a terracube to other terracubes
You haven't seen any Terracubes, and now they won't be seeing you either
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.terraguard.des: Consuming clay temporarily increases your defenses.
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.trick_bandolie: Gives the gun three toggleable bullet slots. Select the slot by attacking, or access them by sneaking and attacking
modifier.joy_of_tinkering.well_read.desc: Interacting with the helmet allows reading the book stored inside
